name: tier1_doc_number_in_body_text
description: Tier 1 fallback path: Evidence.doc_number is empty/None, but the body text contains a USD reference. The tagger scrapes the text via collect_doc_numbers (canonicalizes USD-22222 -> USD00022222) and re-uses the Tier 1 LIKE lookup. Pins that body-text USD discovery still produces a Tier 1 (0.9/1.0) tag, not a degraded one.

objectives.implementation_guidance: USD00022222 establishes the account management baseline.

evidence.text: Implementation is governed per USD-22222 as cited above.
